# Nocturn E2E (Playwright)

Smoke-coverage suite gating every PR.

## Suites (generated by Day 0 hardening prompt)

- `auth.spec.ts` — signup → onboarding → dashboard
- `marketing-agent.spec.ts` — create event → Marketing Hub → generate IG caption → copy
- `finance-agent.spec.ts` — close event → Finance → settlement math → confirm payout
- `five-screens-nav.spec.ts` — Home/Events/Marketing/Finance/Settings bottom-tab nav
- `event-creation.spec.ts` — AI event creation (text, voice, URL)
- `ticket-purchase.spec.ts` — public event page → Stripe test card `4242 4242 4242 4242` → confirmation + QR
- `ticket-edge-cases.spec.ts` — sold-out mid-checkout, card decline, refresh during payment, webhook replay
- `check-in.spec.ts` — valid QR scan, duplicate scan rejected, invalid QR, live dashboard updates
- `dashboard-empty-states.spec.ts` — new collective, zero events, empty states on 5 screens

## Running locally

```bash
npm run dev     # in one terminal
npx playwright test
npx playwright test --ui    # interactive
```

## Conventions

- Stripe test mode only; never real card numbers
- Use `fixtures/` for seeded ticket data, fake collectives, auth sessions
- Auth fixture reuses a logged-in storage state across tests
- Tests are smoke coverage — happy path + 1 key failure mode per flow
- Target: full suite < 4 min in CI
